name: Bloomberg L.P.
lede: Bloomberg runs two centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Pune, covering GCC/GIC and IT, built over 30 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bloomberg office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bloomberg L.P. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bloomberg runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Pune), covering GCC/GIC and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Head of India Engineering at Bloomberg LP
South Asia Head of Enterprise Sales

about.description: Bloomberg's India footprint covers Mumbai and Pune, spanning GCC/GIC and IT. The centers deliver IT, HR, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all six decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Bloomberg operate in India?
faq.a: Bloomberg operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Bloomberg have centers in?
faq.a: Bloomberg's India footprint includes Mumbai and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Bloomberg run in India?
faq.a: Bloomberg runs GCC/GIC and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Bloomberg's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Bloomberg's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bloomberg's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Bloomberg's India centers, across IT. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
